action.description: May AP release a payment after a sanctions near-match alert?

context.action_boundary: May AP release a payment after a sanctions near-match alert?
context.anomaly_observed: A sanctions near-match alert remains visible for a similar vendor name.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Payment request PAY-VEY-2026-033 releases USD 48,200 to Veyra Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-8841, account ending 7712.
Sanctions near-match alert references Veyra Medica Ltd, Belarus, no tax ID match.
Compliance clearance CLR-VEY-033 covers Veyra Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-8841, account ending 7712, and explicitly states the Belarus near-match is not the same counterparty.

policy_documents.content: A sanctions near-match is closed only when clearance matches legal name, registration country, tax ID, and counterparty account before release.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
